name: grant-prime
description: Automated grant discovery, scoring, and tracking for Noble Erne, LLC

scripts.daily: node agents/grant-discovery-agent.js && node agents/grant-amount-enricher.js && node agents/grant-scoring-agent.js && node agents/grant-strategy-agent.js && node agents/grant-intel-agent.js && node agents/grant-test-runner.js && node agents/grant-alert-agent.js && node agents/grant-deadline-monitor.js && node agents/grant-health-monitor.js && node agents/grant-autofix-agent.js && node agents/treagent.js
